title: Asia Diversifies Crude Sources In July Amid Geopolitical Flashpoints
section_path: Asia Diversifies Crude Sources In July Amid Geopolitical Flashpoints
section_path_text: Asia Diversifies Crude Sources In July Amid Geopolitical Flashpoints
summary:
Main
This blog explores how rising tensions in the Middle East have influenced Asia's crude import patterns, particularly for non-sanctioned supply sources. By Ivan Mathews
Crude arrivals into Asia (excluding China and India) are set to rise by 2.4% m-o-m in July. The increase is in line with seasonal patterns as refineries in Northeast and Southeast Asia typically ramp up imports throughput Q3 following scheduled maintenance in Q2.
